summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of /equipment-reliability (chapter 3 of 5 disciplines). 69/69 effective assertions passed across page load, hero video, three new custom primitives (margin gauge, AMP duo, vertical phase timeline), cost/gain accordions, mosaic navigation, CTA links, responsive collapse (tablet 768 + mobile 375), and cross-discipline regression (OD + FL videos still autoplay). Zero console errors. One reported FAIL was a test-script false-positive: er-handoff-label uses CSS text-transform: uppercase, so inner_text() returned 'THE COMMERCIAL FRAME' instead of the source 'The Commercial Frame' — content is correct in DOM, verified by the adjacent pull-quote assertion passing.
critical_code_review_comments: EquipmentReliability.jsx is 1256 lines, of which ~700 lines are inlined <style> CSS. Consider extracting page-scoped CSS into a sibling .module.css or co-located styled component to keep JSX under the 700-line guideline and improve maintainability. Same pattern likely exists on OD/FL — refactor opportunity across all 5 discipline pages.

The Tablet breakpoint at max-width:1099px and Mobile breakpoint at max-width:639px leaves the 640–1099px range on the tablet treatment, which is correct, but no explicit breakpoint matches the spec's stated 768x1024 target — happens to work because 768 ≤ 1099. Document the intended breakpoint boundaries.

Hero video lacks a fallback

child for browsers that block autoplay or fail to load both sources; consider adding a graceful-degradation message or static poster-only state.

All 5 mosaic cards including 4 sister-discipline Link routes work, but two of the routes (/workforce-capability and /daily-accountability) are not yet built per the agent context note. When clicked they will likely 404 or render a placeholder — confirm App.js routing handles this gracefully before launch.
context_for_next_testing_agent: EquipmentReliability page is fully validated. All data-testid coverage confirmed: er-hero-h1, equipment-reliability-hero-video, er-reframe-h2, er-margin-gauge (3 bands / 5 ticks / 3 legend items), er-reframe-facts, er-reframe-pullquote, er-amp-duo (3-col desktop, 1-col tablet w/ horizontal axis), er-amp-channel-tactical (6 items inc. MMOS), er-amp-channel-technical (6 items inc. Maintenance fundamentals + Electrical control), er-amp-callout (60%), er-cost-grid + er-cost-card-01..06 (click toggles aria-expanded), er-cost-callout ($50 billion), er-phase-timeline (vertical), er-phase-step-01..03, er-handoff (The Commercial Frame + paid-for-results), er-gain-grid + er-gain-card-01..05, er-results-strip (47% / 85% / $M+), er-mosaic + er-mosaic-current (03) + 4 sister Links route correctly, er-cta-contact -> /contact, er-cta-cases -> /case-studies. Responsive verified at 1920, 768, 375. No horizontal overflow on mobile. OD and FL videos still autoplay after navigation from ER mosaic — no CSS clobbering across disciplines.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Page is production-ready for chapter 3.
